projects.name: Melula Website
projects.description: A modern e-commerce site for selling digital and physical products.
projects.problem: Small businesses struggle to sell both digital and physical products online.
projects.solution: Built a clean, scalable e-commerce platform with modern UI.

projects.name: Movie Website (Cineby)
projects.description: A streaming platform design concept with a clean, cinematic interface.
projects.problem: Movie platforms often feel cluttered and overwhelming.
projects.solution: Designed a minimal, cinematic browsing experience.

projects.name: BookSell Website
projects.description: An online bookstore platform with user-friendly navigation and sleek design.
projects.problem: Local book sellers lack affordable digital platforms.
projects.solution: Created a responsive and intuitive bookstore experience.

projects.name: Recipe Finder
projects.description: A productivity tool focused on finding and organizing recipes easily.
projects.problem: People struggle to quickly find recipes based on ingredients.
projects.solution: Built a fast and simple recipe discovery app.

projects.name: Task Manager
projects.description: A productivity tool focused on task planning and tracking with clarity.
projects.problem: Users need simple tools to manage daily tasks effectively.
projects.solution: Developed a clean and focused task management system.
